Why Partner With Us

What your college gets

A partnership with Under25 is zero cost and high return — for your institution and your students.

💰
Revenue Share
Every brand activation on your campus generates income shared directly with your institution. No effort needed — we bring the brands.
🎉
Funded Events & Fests
Brands co-fund your college fests and competitions — reducing costs significantly for your college and student bodies.
🌟
Paid Student Opportunities
Your students get selected and paid as Brand Ambassadors — earning real professional experience while still studying.
🔥
Better Campus Culture
Regular brand-backed events keep students engaged year-round — building the campus energy that attracts and retains students.
On Campus

looks like.

Colleges.

How It Works

Simple. Zero risk.
Fully managed.

We handle everything — your team barely needs to lift a finger.

01

We Sign an MOU

No upfront cost. A simple agreement is all it takes to get started.

02

We Match Brands

We select brands from our network that fit your student profile and campus.

03

We Execute On Campus

Our team handles all logistics, coordination, and on-ground execution.

04

You Earn & Get Reports

Receive your revenue share and a full campaign report after every activation.

Zero Upfront Cost Revenue Share Fully Managed by Us Your Approval Always Transparent Reporting
